2605.10813.title: NanoResearch: Co-Evolving Skills, Memory, and Policy for Personalized Research Automation
2605.10813.paper_summary: LLM-powered multi-agent systems can now automate the full research pipeline from ideation to paper writing, but a fundamental question remains: automation for whom? Researchers operate under different resource configurations, hold different methodological preferences, and target different output formats. A system that produces uniform outputs regardless of these differences will systematically under-serve every individual user, making personalization a precondition for research automation to be genuinely usable. However, achieving it requires three capabilities that current systems lack: accumulating reusable procedural knowledge across projects, retaining user-specific experience across sessions, and internalizing implicit preferences that resist explicit formalization. We propose NanoResearch, a multi-agent framework that addresses these gaps through tri-level co-evolution. A skill bank distills recurring operations into compact procedural rules reusable across projects. A memory module maintains user- and project-specific experience that grounds planning decisions in each user's research history. A label-free policy learning converts free-form feedback into persistent parameter updates of the planner, reshaping subsequent coordination. These three layers co-evolve: reliable skills produce richer memory, richer memory informs better planning, and preference internalization continuously realigns the loop to each user. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NanoResearch delivers substantial gains over state-of-the-art AI research systems, and progressively refines itself to produce better research at lower cost over successive cycles.
2605.10813.paper_summary_zh: LLM 驅動的多代理系統現在可以自動化從構思到論文寫作的完整研究流程，但仍然存在一個根本問題：自動化是為了誰？研究者在不同的資源配置下運作，持有不同的方法偏好，並針對不同的輸出格式。無論這些差異如何，產生統一輸出的系統將系統性地無法滿足每個個別用戶的需求，使得個性化成為研究自動化真正可用的前提。然而，實現這一目標需要三種目前系統所缺乏的能力：在項目之間積累可重用的程序知識、在會話之間保留用戶特定的經驗，以及內化抵抗明確形式化的隱性偏好。我們提出了 NanoResearch，一個通過三層共同進化來解決這些差距的多代理框架。一個技能庫將重複的操作提煉為可在項目之間重用的緊湊程序規則。一個記憶模塊維護用戶和項目特定的經驗，將規劃決策基於每個用戶的研究歷史。一個無標籤的政策學習將自由形式的反饋轉換為規劃者的持久參數更新，重塑後續的協調。這三個層次共同進化：可靠的技能產生更豐富的記憶，更豐富的記憶促進更好的規劃，而偏好的內化不斷地將循環重新調整到每個用戶。大量實驗表明，NanoResearch 在最先進的 AI 研究系統上提供了顯著的增益，並在隨後的循環中逐步自我完善，以更低的成本產出更好的研究。
2605.10813.author: Jinhang Xu et.al.
2605.10813.authors: Jinhang Xu, Qiyuan Zhu, Yujun Wu, Zirui Wang, Dongxu Zhang, Jianxin Tang, Marcia Tian, Yiling Duan, Siyuan Li, Jingxuan Wei, Sirui Han, Yike Guo, Odin Zhang, Conghui He, Cheng Tan
